no: D0 Tweak v26 by SimDing0. Classic BG2 tweak mod with 28 components. ABANDONED. Most components superseded by Tweaks Anthology (cdtweaks), SCS, or EE updates. Two components (cn:9, cn:27) are EET-incompatible (ENGINE_IS bg2 tob). Useful as a reference for what tweaks are available, but modern alternatives exist for nearly everything.

conflicts.reason: Visual Ioun Stones. IR main (cn:0) — cn:1060/1070 tweaks selected. No conflict.
D0 Tweak components #0 (BG1-Style Summoning Spells) and #23 overlap with SR's revised summoning. PnP Celestial Fury (#7) does not conflict. Only relevant if summoning components are installed.
conflicts.source: tp2 analysis — d0tweak #7 (PnP Celestial Fury) is unrelated to SR spell changes, 2026-03

sum: D0's classic tweak mod for BG2. Predates the Tweaks Anthology and offers classic rule adjustments.

co.no: Scales Goodberry healing with caster level (1hp at L3, up to 13hp at L21). Superseded by cdtweaks and other tweak mods.
Alternative Goodberry option. Subcomponent of cn:0.
Fixes AI for summoned demons so they behave more logically. Largely superseded by SCS creature AI.
Fixes visual animations for demon creatures. Mostly fixed in EE already.
Adds Dimension Door spell back to the game. Done by other mods (MiH Tweaks, Teleport mod).
Alternative Dimension Door option.
Adjusts weapon enchantment values for PnP accuracy. Superseded by cdtweaks weapon components.
Alternative weapon enchantment option.
Adds more racial enemy choices for Rangers (Giants, Githyanki, Ankhegs, Orcs, Wyverns, Yuan-Ti). Superseded by cdtweaks #3121.
Removes the 5-creature summoning limit. EET INCOMPATIBLE: uses ENGINE_IS bg2 tob which fails on EET. Superseded by cdtweaks.
Makes Celestial Fury work closer to PnP rules. Adjusts the weapon's stats and abilities. Minor item tweak.
Fixes holy symbols to work correctly. Covered by EE Fixpack in most cases.
Removes Cespenar (the imp merchant in ToB Pocket Plane). Niche preference for players who find him annoying.
Improves AI for Mislead/Project Image/Simulacrum clones. Superseded by SCS and SubtleD Spell Tweaks cn:40.
co.tp2n: Kensai Ryu's Restored Drow Innate Abilities

co.no: Adds orbiting stone visual effects when Ioun Stones are equipped. Cosmetic only.
Allows dual-classing into/from Wild Mage. Niche class option.

co.n: Kensai Ryu's Restored Drow Innate Abilities
co.no: Restores racial innate abilities for Drow characters. Done by other mods and EE updates.
Adds Displacer Beast creatures to random encounters. Creature content addition.
Removes Quayle's portrait. Very niche cosmetic tweak.
Fixes dream sequence trigger flags. Bug fix.
co.tp2n: Everyone can set off traps (excluding illusions, etc.)

co.no: Adjusts Lore skill progression to scale more sensibly. Done by Bart Tweaks cn:3000 and cdtweaks.
co.tp2n: Green and blue circles, and enemy summons can set off traps

co.no: Changes backstab mechanics. Superseded by Rogue Rebalancing and Might & Guile backstab components.
co.tp2n: Only green-circles and enemy summons can set off traps

co.no: Internal subcomponent for backstab processing.
Misc tweaks. Check readme for details.
Misc tweaks. Check readme for details.
Misc tweaks. Check readme for details.
Reduces character movement speed. Preference tweak for more deliberate gameplay.
Reverts summoning spells to BG1 behavior. EET INCOMPATIBLE: uses ENGINE_IS bg2 tob which fails on EET.
